_comment: T-065: Pending plans awaiting Michele's review. Seeded with plans surfaced 2026-05-23 from ~/.claude/plans/ that are explicitly 'Draft for review' / 'Not approved'. Promotion to active = move the entry to active-roadmaps.json (and remove from here). Auto-suggested entries (scanned from ~/.claude/plans/ at request time, not stored here) come from services/pendingPlansAggregator.js and are returned alongside this manifest as the `suggested_plans` field on the API response.

pending_plans.name: CIS Hardening Baseline v1.1 — Engineering Gap Closure
pending_plans.summary: Closes 8 of 12 Gap controls in 5 phases (destructive-action allowlist scrub, npm audit + Semgrep CI gate, SBOM emission, prompt-injection sanitization, allowedTools allowlist). Gap count drops 12 → 4. Required before Stripe + QuickBooks production traffic.

pending_plans.name: Pre-Launch Non-Dilutive Capital Stack (Now → Oct 1, 2026)
pending_plans.summary: $10K–$50K non-dilutive cash + $100K–$300K cloud/API credits over 90 days, zero equity. Four parallel tracks (cloud/API credits, grants, WOSB/WBENC certs, CDFI bridge). 5 sub-decisions owed; default if no decision this week = run Microsoft + AWS + NVIDIA self-serve (~90 min).

pending_plans.name: Tickets Page Enhancements v2 (post-council)
pending_plans.summary: 6-phase plan (F → E → B → C → D1 → D2) to fix Tickets page workflow: clickable ticket IDs, recency-first detail modal, past-due-in-backlog promotion, recommended-for-todo panel, visible Review surface, [NEEDS-DECISION] enforcement. Blocked on Phase A prerequisite — Michele adds 3 status options to Notion DB (Backlog, To Do, Review, ~3 min in UI).

pending_plans.name: Demo Dashboard — Identical to live, seeded data, nightly reset
pending_plans.summary: Second Railway service deploying the same dashboard codebase at `demo.prismaianalytics.com`, gated by `APP_ENV=demo`. Existing `seed-demo.js` (8 fictional clients / 5 projects / 5 invoices / `demo / demo2026` login) populates the DB; Stripe + QB + Notion stubbed via demo-mode fallbacks in `services/` so financial tiles look populated without real keys; in-process `node-cron` reseeds nightly at 03:00 UTC. Three small code touches (`GET /api/config` + demo banner, cron block, service-layer demo-mode branches in stripeService.js / quickbooksService.js + new `services/demoData.js`), plus a `DEMO_SETUP.md` runbook mirroring `STAGING_SETUP.md`. Implementation must wait on the T-027b WIP lock clearing and a fresh ticket dispatch (proposed `T-demo-env`).

pending_plans.name: Prism AI Inventory Monitor (prism-scan Monitor + per-client template) + Discover & Map blog bundle
pending_plans.summary: Extend the existing zero-dependency prism-scan scanner into the full Inventory Monitor: per-item Elevated/Standard classification computed before the secret-scrub boundary; an approved-baseline compare that emits drift events (NEW / REMOVED / DRIFT / TIER_DRIFT) with a non-zero exit on unauthorized drift; and a per-client `init` template scaffolding gitignored clients/<slug>/ workspaces. Plus the 3-part Discover & Map blog bundle (blog source + two LinkedIn companions) featuring the shipped tool. Draft only — no publish date set.
